metadata.description: An identity-side group of persons/service-accounts — identity DATA (ADR-RBAC-001). Distinct from a DCMGroup: a DCMGroup with group_class `access_grouping` is the DCM-native RBAC subject-set that role-assignments bind to (and that the authority-enforcement voting model references); an Identity.Group models a group as it exists in a directory / IdP (e.g. an external group mapped to roles via auth-providers role_mapping) or a native logical grouping of accounts. A DCMGroup (access_grouping) MAY reference an Identity.Group as its membership source. The two are kept distinct so external directory groups stay referenced (PIP), not custodied.

context.purpose: Models a group of identities — native or mirrored from a directory — that role bindings and memberships resolve through.
context.plain_description: A named set of person and service-account identities. Two sources: a built_in group owns its member list locally; an external group mirrors a directory/IdP group and is referenced, never copied — membership stays authoritative in the directory. Access-control machinery binds roles to groups rather than to individuals, so joining or leaving a group is the whole access change.
use_when: You need role assignments to bind to a set of identities instead of to individuals.
You need a directory (LDAP/IdP) group represented in the model without duplicating its membership.
not_for: The directory server that hosts an external group — Security.DirectoryService.
The secret an account authenticates with — Security.CredentialRef; groups hold identities, never credentials.
works_with: Identity.Person / Identity.ServiceAccount — the members, for built_in groups.
Security.DirectoryService — the source of an external group's membership.

source.description: built_in = a native group of local identities; external = mirrors a directory/IdP group (referenced, not custodied).

external_group_ref.description: For source=external: the directory group DN / IdP group id (a PIP reference).

members.description: For source=built_in: actor_uuids of Identity.Person / Identity.ServiceAccount members. For source=external: resolved from the directory (referenced).

group_ref.description: Referenced by a DCMGroup (access_grouping) membership source and by auth-providers role_mapping.

relationships.description: The directory this group is sourced from (for source=external).
